title: AntiBlocksReChiseled
description: This Mod Readds the Antiblocks from Chisel with new colors!
body:
![](https://cdn.manmaed.net/devins-badges/neoforge_vector.svg) ![](https://cdn.manmaed.net/devins-badges/fabric_vector.svg) ![](https://cdn.manmaed.net/devins-badges/forge_vector.svg)
[![](https://cdn.manmaed.net/devins-badges/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/antiblocksrechiseled) [![](https://cdn.manmaed.net/devins-badges/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/antiblocksrechiseled/) ### Fabric Versions:
![](https://cdn.manmaed.net/devins-badges/fabric-api_vector.svg) This Mod Readds the Antiblocks from Chisel with new colors! This mod uses full bright and blocks emit light level 15 Please Note, this is not a fork of Chisel or Other Antiblock type mods As of 1.20.1+ All Loaders have CTM Support with [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLWeFJiL/images/0bbfc5eb09ed968f758cf9142da3fd46594a2c30.png)
